title: South Riding
writer: Winifred Holtby, Ian Dalrymple, Donald Bull
actors: Edna Best, Ralph Richardson, Edmund Gwenn
plot: Winifred Holtby realised that local government is not a dry affair of meetings and memoranda, but the front-line defence thrown up by humanity against its common enemies of sickness, poverty and ignorance. She built her story arou...
